specs.title: AI Foundation Package (provider-agnostic @repo/ai-core)
specs.note: FOUNDATION spec for adding AI to Hospeda. Only the infra: @repo/ai-core package (provider-agnostic, Vercel AI SDK wrapped), admin-managed config (new PermissionEnum.AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE, SUPER_ADMIN), encrypted secrets vault (keys editable from admin, decrypted in apps/api, passed to package by param), usage metering + per-plan entitlement enforcement (login required for ALL AI, no anonymous), cost ceiling + kill-switch + threshold alerts via @repo/notifications, SSE streaming primitive, safety layer (rate-limit + injection guard + moderation + PII scrub for external telemetry), tables in @repo/db (NOT portable — conscious tradeoff, DB access isolated in storage/). Multi-provider = fallback + per-feature routing (V1); advanced routing + vector DB/embeddings + async jobs = V2. 4 V1 features (text improvement, NL search, accommodation chat, admin tech-support) are CHILD specs, out of scope here. Allocated SPEC-173 = max(git=172, engram-stale=144)+1. SS12 mandatory decision protocol: consult owner on ANY ambiguity. Tasks not yet atomized; 7 blocking open questions in spec.md SS8.
specs.completionRef: PR #1466 merged to staging (28e726d3b), 43/43 tasks, judgment-day double-APPROVED

specs.title: AI Accommodation Chat (tourist)
specs.archiveNote: DRIFT FIX: shipped via PRs #1492/#1494/#1497/#1507 + prod-readiness #1520, archived by #1584, promoted to main via #1542. A stale-base index edit reverted it to in-progress; this restores completed/archived. The provisional monetization/metering was deliberately deferred to SPEC-211 (not pending work in SPEC-200).
specs.note: Implemented and merged to staging via PRs #1492/#1494/#1497/#1507. Prod-readiness fixes on branch fix/SPEC-200-prod-readiness (PR #1520). Chat works (ai_chat is granted to every plan, tourists included), but its monetization is provisional: the quota is charged to the tourist, not the accommodation owner, so a VIP tourist gets unlimited chat the owner never pays for. SPEC-211 reworks this (owner-governed chat + Model C). SPEC-200 can ship to prod after SPEC-211 Phase 0 cost mitigation (finite quotas + USD ceiling).

specs.title: Host Analytics & KPIs — Business Dashboard in Web
specs.note: Phase 3 of host migration. Formalized 2026-06-13 with spec.md (was index-only draft). A web-only cabling pass (fix/web-mi-cuenta-host-dashboard) shipped: fixed the entitlement gate case mismatch (view_basic_stats), re-pointed response-rate/inquiries/market-comparison to their real routes, gated the market widget behind view_advanced_stats, and added missing host.dashboard.* i18n keys. Remaining epic work: (A) build a protected per-host daily-series views endpoint + re-mount ViewsWidget; (B) redesign FavoritesWidget to the per-accommodation shape (no 'collections' in the model) + re-mount; (C) staging smoke on owner-pro/owner-premium. Views & Favorites widgets are currently NOT mounted (deferred). Depends on SPEC-205, SPEC-206.

specs.title: Web Accommodation Editor — Full Property Management in Web
specs.note: Final phase of host migration. Full accommodation editor in apps/web including media upload, all section forms, validation, and preview. Shipped ad-hoc via PRs #1509/#1513/#1516 (Phases A/B/C) WITHOUT a formal .qtm/specs/SPEC-208-web-accommodation-editor/ directory (no spec.md). Prod-readiness review (2026-06-09) found blockers, all fixed + merged to staging: protected update dropped nested fields + media (#1528), open geocoding proxy (#1529), no protected media delete + orphan assets (#1533, re-landed via #1540 after stacked-base stranding), index drift (#1534). Local e2e PASSED 6/6 (persistence, no-clobber, geocoding 401/200, media delete own-200/foreign-403). Closed 2026-06-10.
